privileged_info_summary: The task generates a bibliography for three landmark U.S. Supreme Court cases: Brown v. Board of Education (347 U.S. 483, 1954), Gideon v. Wainwright (372 U.S. 335, 1963), and Miranda v. Arizona (384 U.S. 436, 1966). The case data is synthetic, injected into the Jurism legal reference management database via a Python script that contains hardcoded legal references based on publicly available Supreme Court records. The task requires using Jurism's citation generation feature to produce an RTF-formatted bibliography saved to /home/ga/Documents/warren_bibliography.rtf. Note: The metadata contains a slight discrepancy - it lists 'Brown v. Board' but the actual case name in the database is 'Brown v. Board of Education'.
